objective: Define LOD, compression, and mobile fallback for production-ready 3D assets and environments

lod_1.description: Low-poly base mesh with minimal texture detail

lod_2.description: Medium-poly mesh with optimized textures and basic lighting

lod_3.description: High-poly, detailed mesh with full texture and lighting
lod_3.use_case: High-end devices and premium desktop experience

textures.format: WebP (lossy for UI, lossless for critical data visualization)

models.compression: ZIP for mobile, GLB for desktop

animations.compression_ratio: 70% for UI transitions, 90% for data visualization

assets.model: LOD 1 for mobile, LOD 2 for desktop

performance.memory: Optimized memory usage with asset pooling

visual_language.colors: Brand color palette with high contrast for readability
visual_language.fonts: Custom UI font for brand consistency

ui_elements.icons: Vector-based, scalable, and optimized for mobile
ui_elements.panels: Responsive layout for all screen sizes

animations.timing: Subtle, clean animations aligned with brand principles

approved_upstream_decisions.font_family: Custom UI Font (Font Awesome + custom glyphs)
